title: furry ears and tails for all mobs!
description: this reourse pack adds furry ears and tails for 21 mobs
body:
furry ears and tail for 21 mobs 🦊 Tails & Ears for Mobs
📦 About

This resource pack adds tails and ears to most vanilla mobs, making them look more lively and expressive while staying true to the Minecraft style.

✨ Features

Tails and ears for the majority of mobs

Vanilla-friendly visuals

No mods required

Works in Survival, Creative, and RP worlds

Compatible with other resource packs (priority-based)

🎯 Why download?

Makes the game world feel more alive and unique

Perfect for screenshots, videos, and roleplay

Easy to install with no FPS impact

⚠️ Note

Some mobs may not have tails or ears due to model limitations.
